caller-service/pom.xml.general_idea: Switched the Maven parent from spring-boot-starter-parent to a custom project parent to inherit shared configuration.
Removed explicit Java version properties, relying on the new parent POM to define the target JDK version.
Added SonarQube module key property to enable static code analysis integration.
Updated Lombok dependency to a newer version compatible with the target environment.
Added Hoverfly Java JUnit5 dependency to enable API mocking in tests.

person-service/pom.xml.general_idea: Switched the Maven parent from spring-boot-starter-parent to a custom project parent to inherit shared configuration.
Removed explicit Java 11 compiler source/target properties, relying on the new parent POM or environment for JDK 17 configuration.
Added SonarQube module key property to enable static code analysis integration.
Defined a property for the Testcontainers library version to manage dependency versions centrally.
Upgraded Lombok dependency to a newer version compatible with the target environment.
Added Testcontainers PostgreSQL dependency to enable containerized database testing.
Added Testcontainers JUnit Jupiter dependency to integrate container lifecycle with JUnit 5 tests.
Added Instancio JUnit dependency to simplify test data generation.
Added Testcontainers BOM to dependency management to ensure consistent versions of Testcontainers modules.

pom.xml.general_idea: Inherit from spring-boot-starter-parent to manage dependencies and plugin versions.
Update the target Java version from 15 to 17 to align with the migration goal.
Add SonarCloud configuration properties for static code analysis integration.

k8s/liquibase-cm-v2.yaml.general_idea: Corrected SQL ALTER TABLE statements by adding the missing table name 'person' to ensure valid syntax.
k8s/liquibase-cm-v2.yaml.human_impl: alter table person rename column firstname to first_name;

k8s/liquibase-job-v1.yaml.general_idea: Switch the Liquibase container image to a custom or updated registry path.

k8s/liquibase-job-v2.yaml.general_idea: Switch the Liquibase container image to a custom build tailored for the Kubernetes environment.
Move database password from hardcoded value to a Kubernetes Secret reference for better security.
k8s/liquibase-job-v2.yaml.human_impl:
valueFrom:
  secretKeyRef:
    key: POSTGRES_PASSWORD
    name: postgres-secret
